title: JustArmorHud
description: Minimalistic armor HUD with durability indicators :D
body:
✨ Features:

Clean HUD Display - See your armor durability at a glance with color-coded numbers
Fully Customizable - Drag & drop positioning, adjustable scale, spacing, and colors
Mainhand & Offhand Support - Track all your gear in one place
Multiple Display Modes - Toggle vanilla durability bars, max damage format (407/407), shadows, and more

⚙️ Easy Configuration
Press J to open the settings menu. Change everything from durability position to text colors without restarting your game.

🎯 Drag & Drop Positioning
Click "HUD Editor" to precisely position your armor, mainhand, and offhand displays separately. No more fighting with config files!

Default Keybinds:

G - Toggle HUD on/off
J - Open settings
